meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Project Management for Freelancers: Scale Beyond Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to implement professional project management workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-value SaaS.
content.answer_block: To evolve beyond basic apps, you must implement a robust project management architecture. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous refactoring, you transition from 'coder' to 'architect.' This workflow automates technical debt management and enforces professional-grade structure, allowing you to ship complex, scalable SaaS products faster.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: a client brief lands, you spin up a boilerplate, and three days later you’re drowning in spaghetti code, struggling to manage state, and realizing your 'app' is just a glorified CRUD form. The gap between a hobbyist script and a production-ready SaaS isn't just about more code—it's about the structural integrity of your project management workflow.

Today, we stop the cycle of technical stagnation. We are leveraging Antigravity to architect your foundation and Claude Code to execute the heavy lifting. By shifting your focus from writing lines to managing systems, you’ll transform your output from disposable scripts into high-ticket, scalable assets that clients actually pay for.

steps.title: Define Domain Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, map your business logic into a formal schema to prevent 'feature creep' and structural collapse.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead Software Architect. Create a modular project structure for a SaaS app using Next.js and Supabase. Define clear separation between API routes, domain services, and UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project directory structure based on architecture schema'

steps.title: Automate State Management
steps.description: Standardize how data flows through your app to avoid the common pitfalls of fragmented state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a centralized state management pattern using Zustand, ensuring type safety and persistence for user-specific data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement zustand store with custom middleware for persistence'

steps.title: Implement Robust Error Handling
steps.description: Build a professional-grade global error boundary to ensure your app doesn't crash during production edge cases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a unified error handling service that logs to a mock service and displays user-friendly toast notifications.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'inject global error boundary wrapper into main layout'

steps.title: Standardize API Layer
steps.description: Abstract your data fetching to ensure consistency across the entire application, making maintenance trivial.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a custom React Query hook factory that standardizes CRUD operations and loading states for all database entities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor existing API calls to use the new hook factory'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Stop manual testing. Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your core business logic automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vitest configuration and boilerplate for testing critical business logic modules created in previous steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for all domain services'

pro_tips: Treat your directory structure like a filesystem database; if you can't find a file in 2 seconds, your architecture is failing.
Use Claude Code to perform 'diff-based' refactoring to minimize regression risks during major structural changes.
Always wrap external API calls in a circuit breaker pattern to prevent your app from hanging on third-party failures.
Documentation is code. Use Antigravity to generate README.md files that explain the 'Why' behind your architectural choices.
Implement a 'Feature Flag' system early, even for solo projects, to decouple deployment from feature release.
content.next_steps: Once your project structure is live, focus on setting up CI/CD pipelines to automate your deployment cycle. Consistent shipping is the final step to professional mastery.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps and start building professional-grade SaaS products that command higher fees. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
